name: World of Mines Creator's Edition
short_description: Classic Minesweeper meets pixel art creativity! Craft unique pixel puzzles, transform them into challenging minesweeper levels, and explore endless community creations.
detailed_description:
Dive into World of Mines Creator’s Edition — where classic Minesweeper meets limitless pixel-art creativity. Build your own pixel artworks with an intuitive in-game editor, then instantly transform them into playable, hand-crafted Minesweeper puzzles.

Play over 600 community-created levels, discover new pixel challenges every week, and share your creations through Steam Workshop. Whether you love logic puzzles, pixel art, or the nostalgia of Minesweeper, World of Mines turns creativity into gameplay.

Create

Design pixel art from scratch using a simple grid editor. Every pixel becomes a tile — place, paint, and sculpt your image into a custom puzzle.

Play

Test your creations or explore a growing library of player-made levels, from meme art and retro icons to detailed illustrations and themed puzzle packs.

Share

Publish your artwork in the Steam Workshop with one click. Browse, rate, and save designs from players around the world.

Features

• Pixel art editor → instantly converts art into Minesweeper puzzles
• 600+ community puzzle levels and growing daily
• Unique challenge themes: retro, memes, art, logic, abstract
• Endless creativity through Steam Workshop
• Relaxing design, challenging gameplay
• Beginner-friendly creation tools
• Classic Minesweeper rules reimagined with art
• Support for 27+ languages

How to Play

Each pixel may hide a mine. Numbers show how many mines surround a tile. Mark suspected mines with a flag, reveal safe tiles, and uncover the full artwork without detonating a bomb.

Unleash your creativity, test your logic, and join a community reshaping Minesweeper one pixel at a time.

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Japanese, Korean, Portuguese - Portugal, Portuguese - Brazil, Russian, Simplified Chinese, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Arabic, Czech, Dutch, Finnish, Hungarian, Norwegian, Swedish, Thai, Turkish, Vietnamese, Hindi, Indonesian, Malay, Persian
